feature01-stage-toolbox.md.title: Stage Toolbox
feature01-stage-toolbox.md.description: The Stage Toolbox provides a centralized view of development tools organized by workflow stage. It helps users discover which tools are available for each phase of the engineering lifecycle.
feature01-stage-toolbox.md.author: AI Librarian

feature02-skills-browser.md.title: Skills Browser
feature02-skills-browser.md.description: The Skills Browser modal shows all available X-IPE skills that can be used in workflow actions. Skills are the task-based automation units that power each workflow action.
feature02-skills-browser.md.author: AI Librarian

feature03-context-menu-override.md.title: Context Menu Manual Override
feature03-context-menu-override.md.description: Right-clicking any workflow action button reveals a context menu that allows you to manually override the action's status. This is useful for recovering from stuck actions or correcting incorrect stat
feature03-context-menu-override.md.author: AI Librarian

feature04-knowledge-base-browser.md.title: Knowledge Base Browser
feature04-knowledge-base-browser.md.description: The Knowledge Base (KB) Browser — called the "Knowledge Atelier" — is a full-featured modal for browsing, searching, and managing KB articles. It provides grid/list views, filtering, and article detai
feature04-knowledge-base-browser.md.author: AI Librarian

feature05-compose-idea-modal.md.title: Compose Idea Modal
feature05-compose-idea-modal.md.description: The Compose Idea Modal is the primary interface for creating new ideas in the Ideation stage. It provides a markdown editor, file upload, and KB reference linking.
feature05-compose-idea-modal.md.author: AI Librarian

feature06-deliverables-browser.md.title: Deliverables Folder Browser
feature06-deliverables-browser.md.description: The Deliverables Folder Browser is a two-panel modal for navigating and previewing files generated by workflow actions. It opens when you click a folder in the deliverables section.
feature06-deliverables-browser.md.author: AI Librarian

feature07-action-candidates.md.title: Action Candidates
feature07-action-candidates.md.description: Action Candidates are pre-resolved file/folder paths from previous action deliverables that serve as input for the current action. They appear as a dropdown in the Action Execution Modal.
feature07-action-candidates.md.author: AI Librarian

feature08-polling-auto-refresh.md.title: Polling & Auto-Refresh
feature08-polling-auto-refresh.md.description: Workflow panels automatically refresh every 7 seconds when expanded, keeping the UI in sync with backend state changes triggered by AI actions.
feature08-polling-auto-refresh.md.author: AI Librarian

feature09-error-recovery.md.title: Error Recovery
feature09-error-recovery.md.description: This section documents how to handle and recover from errors in workflow mode, including action failures, network issues, and state corruption.
feature09-error-recovery.md.author: AI Librarian

feature10-workflow-state-persistence.md.title: Workflow State Persistence
feature10-workflow-state-persistence.md.description: Each workflow's state is persisted as a JSON file on disk. This enables resume after restart, crash recovery, and version tracking.
feature10-workflow-state-persistence.md.author: AI Librarian
